mapper.select: select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as teacher_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from course_schedule s left join course_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.teacher_id = u.id left join academic_term t on s.term_id = t.id left join class_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where s.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by s.id desc

select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as teacher_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from course_selection cs inner join course_schedule s on cs.schedule_id = s.id left join course_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.teacher_id = u.id left join academic_term t on s.term_id = t.id left join class_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where cs.student_id = #{studentId} order by s.id desc

select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as teacher_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from course_schedule s left join course_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.teacher_id = u.id left join academic_term t on s.term_id = t.id left join class_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into course_schedule (course_id, term_id, teacher_id, class_id, classroom, week_day, start_section, end_section, max_student_count, selected_count, status) values (#{courseId}, #{termId}, #{teacherId}, #{classId}, #{classroom}, #{weekDay}, #{startSection}, #{endSection}, #{maxStudentCount}, #{selectedCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: update course_schedule set selected_count = selected_count + 1 where id = #{id}
